name: F-F 3-Factor Market premium (Mkt-RF)
notes: Kenneth French data library — US market excess return back to 1926-07 from the F-F 3-Factor monthly file. ZIP: https://mba.tuck.dartmouth.edu/pages/faculty/ken.french/ftp/F-F_Research_Data_Factors_CSV.zip. Wired §3.11 2026-06-10 — driven by regime-AA Phase 0 long-run factor requirement. Switched 2026-06-11 from the 5-Factors_2x3 file (which only starts 1963-07) to the 3-Factor file to honour the 1926-07 history brief. RMW/CMA stay on the 5-factor ZIP (they only exist from 1963-07).

name: F-F 3-Factor Size (SMB)
notes: Small-minus-Big size factor from the F-F 3-Factor monthly file (ZIP F-F_Research_Data_Factors_CSV.zip). History from 1926-07. Note: the 3-Factor SMB is computed on the 2x3 size/book-to-market sort and differs slightly from the 5-Factor SMB which averages three 2x3 sorts (size/BM + size/OP + size/Inv) — we use the 3-Factor version to preserve the 1926-07 history.

name: F-F 3-Factor Value (HML)
notes: High-minus-Low book/market value factor from the F-F 3-Factor monthly file (ZIP F-F_Research_Data_Factors_CSV.zip). History from 1926-07.

name: F-F 5-Factor Profitability (RMW)
notes: Robust-minus-Weak operating-profitability factor from the F-F 5-Factor 2x3 monthly file (ZIP F-F_Research_Data_5_Factors_2x3_CSV.zip). History from 1963-07 (RMW post-dates Mkt/SMB/HML — operating-profitability data unavailable earlier).

name: F-F 5-Factor Investment (CMA)
notes: Conservative-minus-Aggressive investment factor from the F-F 5-Factor 2x3 monthly file (ZIP F-F_Research_Data_5_Factors_2x3_CSV.zip). History from 1963-07.

name: F-F Risk-Free Rate (1-month T-bill)
notes: One-month Treasury-bill return packaged with the F-F 3-Factor monthly file (ZIP F-F_Research_Data_Factors_CSV.zip). History from 1926-07.
